overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking through a medieval harbor district. The clip progresses from wooden dock planks alongside moored sailing ships, up stairs through a guarded gate, and onto cobblestone waterfront streets with market stalls. The environment features detailed medieval architecture, bustling NPC activity, and bright sunny lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored cargo ships

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock planks between cargo and moored ships

notable_agents.action: dock worker carrying wooden crate walking toward camera
woman in dress walking along the dockside

entered.detail: large red-hulled sailing ship moored at the dock with white sails furled
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
medieval half-timbered houses with steep roofs lining the harbor
thick nautical rope coiled on the dockside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden harbor dock, the character passes between a large red carrack ship moored on the right and timber-framed buildings on the left. Dock workers and pedestrians move along the weathered planks, with rope coils and cargo crates scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock exit with wooden stairs and ship moorings

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs from lower dock to upper level
passes armored guard standing watch near the dock exit

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and passing through the guarded dock exit area

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress descending the wooden stairs
armored guard with shield standing watch at dock exit

entered.detail: wooden staircase leading up from the lower dock level
stone archway marking the entrance to the city streets

segments.scene_description: Ascending wooden stairs from the lower dock, the character passes a woman descending and approaches a stone archway. An armored guard stands watch near the exit as the red ship falls behind and the city buildings draw closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone waterfront street with market stalls

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden dock planks to cobblestone street
entering busier market area with increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking along cobblestone waterfront passing market vendors and townspeople

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople gathered near wooden market stalls
pedestrians walking through the market square

entered.detail: cobblestone pavement replacing the wooden dock planks
wooden market stalls with canvas awnings along the street
stone warehouse buildings with arched doorways

segments.scene_description: Transitioning onto cobblestone streets, the scene opens into a bustling waterfront market area. Wooden market stalls line the right side while groups of townspeople gather and walk through the street, replacing the maritime dock environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with wooden crane

events.description: passing large wooden construction crane on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along open waterfront path toward distant city towers

notable_agents.action: two figures walking ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: large wooden crane structure used for dock operations
tall stone towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide waterfront promenade with a large wooden construction crane dominating the right side. The cobblestone continues toward distant city towers, with fewer pedestrians and more open sky visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the weathered wooden docks of a harbor into the bustling cobblestone streets of a medieval city. It begins by moving along the harbor planks between a large red carrack ship and timber-framed buildings, passing by scattered cargo crates and dock workers. As the camera ascends a set of wooden stairs, the maritime environment recedes and the view shifts toward a stone archway guarded by an armored sentry. The scene then opens into a vibrant waterfront market where the wooden docks are replaced by cobblestones and rows of market stalls crowded with townspeople. Finally, the path expands into a wide promenade dominated by a large wooden construction crane, leading the eye toward distant city towers under an open sky.
